ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_code" TEXT /* Unique code representing the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company associated with the stock */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Remarks or additional notes about the stock */,
  "previous_price" REAL /* Previous closing price of the stock */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock for the trading day */,
  "last_trading_date" TEXT /* Last trading date for the stock */,
  "first_trade" INTEGER /* First trade price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during trading */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during trading */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock for the trading day */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in price compared to the previous day */,
  "trading_volume" INTEGER /* Total trading volume for the stock */,
  "trading_value" REAL /* Total trading value for the stock */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of trading data updates */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company operates in */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the company headquarters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index */,
  "weight_for_index" REAL /* Weight of the stock in the index */,
  "index_type" TEXT /* Type of market index (e.g., broad market, sector-specific) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_details" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade entry */,
  "stock_code" TEXT /* Stock code of the traded stock */,
  "offer_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock is being offered */,
  "offer_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the stock being offered */,
  "bid_price" REAL /* Price at which investors are bidding for the stock */,
  "bid_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of stock being bid for */,
  "listed_shares" INTEGER /* Total number of shares listed */,
  "tradable_shares" INTEGER /* Total number of shares tradable */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Time of the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_details_stock_code FOREIGN KEY ("stock_code") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "non_regular_trades" (
  "non_reg_trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each non-regular trade entry */,
  "stock_code" TEXT /* Stock code of the traded stock */,
  "non_reg_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of non-regular trades */,
  "non_reg_value" REAL /* Value of non-regular trades */,
  "non_reg_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of non-regular trades */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of non-regular trade (e.g., block trade, insider trade) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("non_reg_trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_non_regular_trades_stock_code FOREIGN KEY ("stock_code") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_ownership" (
  "ownership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ownership entry */,
  "stock_code" TEXT /* Stock code of the stock */,
  "shareholder_name" TEXT /* Name of the shareholder */,
  "shareholding_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of shares held by the shareholder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ownership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_ownership_stock_code FOREIGN KEY ("stock_code") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "news_headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "news_content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "news_date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_market_indices_map" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "stock_code" TEXT /* Stock code of the stock in the index */,
  "weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the stock in the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id", "stock_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "stock_code" TEXT /* Stock code of the stock */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the historical data entry */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "trading_volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_historical_data_stock_code FOREIGN KEY ("stock_code") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
